meaning: n.艾格尔峰(位于瑞士中南部)
examples: Harrer was one of the first to climb the north face of the Eiger.
The initial Eiger rock slabs are supposed to be easy, but they aren't today.
The ski resorts of the Jungfrau region lie directly below the world-famous backdrop of the Eiger, the Monch and the Jungfrau.
He also ran seven marathons on seven continents in seven days in 2003, and climbed the treacherous north face of the Eiger in 2007.
In 2003 he ran seven marathons on seven continents in seven days, and in 2007 he climbed the treacherous north face of the Eiger in Switzerland.
